search.query: `netflow_index` (nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20051" OR nfc_id="20052" OR nfc_id="20053") | head 1

`netflow_index` nfc_id="20053" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | timechart count span=1d

`netflow_index` nfc_id="20050" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | timechart count span=1d

`netflow_index` nfc_id="20052" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | timechart count span=1d

`netflow_index` nfc_id="20051" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | timechart count span=1d

map.title: Events by Geo

search.query: `netflow_index` (nfc_id="20053" OR nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20052" OR nfc_id="20051") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval event_type=case( nfc_id="20053","Threat Feeds", nfc_id="20050","Botnet", nfc_id="20051","Custom Threat Feeds", nfc_id="20052","Malicious Hosts") | eval ip=if(nfc_id="20050",src_ip,dest_ip) | iplocation ip | geostats count by event_type

map.option: {Threat Feeds:0x0000FF, Botnet:0x32CD32, Malicious Hosts:0xDC143C, Custom Threat Feeds:0xffa010}

search.query: `netflow_index` (nfc_id="20053" OR nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20051" OR nfc_id="20052") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval name = case(nfc_id=="20053", "Threat Feeds", nfc_id=="20050", "Botnet C&C", nfc_id=="20051", "Custom Threat Feeds", nfc_id==20052, "Malicious Hosts") | timechart count by name

`netflow_index` (nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20051" OR nfc_id="20052" OR nfc_id="20053") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | stats count by src_ip | join type=left src_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20053" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as threat_feeds sum(bytes) as traffic_threat_feeds, distinct_count(dest_ip) as dest_count_threat_feeds by src_ip] | join type=left src_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20050" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as bot_num sum(bytes) as traffic_bot, distinct_count(dest_ip) as dest_count_bot by src_ip] | join type=left src_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20051" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as cust_num sum(bytes) as traffic_cust, distinct_count(dest_ip) as dest_count_cust by src_ip] | join type=left src_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20052" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as mal_num sum(bytes) as traffic_mal, distinct_count(dest_ip) as dest_count_mal by src_ip] | eval traffic_threat_feeds = if(isnull(traffic_threat_feeds), 0, traffic_threat_feeds) | eval traffic_bot = if(isnull(traffic_bot), 0, traffic_bot) | eval traffic_cust = if(isnull(traffic_cust), 0, traffic_cust) | eval traffic_mal = if(isnull(traffic_mal), 0, traffic_mal) | eval dest_count_threat_feeds = if(isnull(dest_count_threat_feeds), 0, dest_count_threat_feeds) | eval dest_count_bot = if(isnull(dest_count_bot), 0, dest_count_bot) | eval dest_count_cust = if(isnull(dest_count_cust), 0, dest_count_cust) | eval dest_count_mal = if(isnull(dest_count_mal), 0, dest_count_mal) | eval threat_feeds = if(isnull(threat_feeds), 0, threat_feeds) | eval bot_num = if(isnull(bot_num), 0, bot_num) | eval cust_num = if(isnull(cust_num), 0, cust_num) | eval mal_num = if(isnull(mal_num), 0, mal_num) | eval traffic = traffic_threat_feeds + traffic_bot + traffic_mal | eval dest_count = dest_count_threat_feeds . "/" . dest_count_bot . "/" . dest_count_mal . "/" . dest_count_cust | eval event_type = threat_feeds . "/" . bot_num . "/" . mal_num . "/" . cust_num | sort - count | head 100 | eval traffic=traffic/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Traffic MB, traffic)` | table src_ip event_type "Traffic MB" dest_count | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename event_type as "Flows: Threat Feeds/Botnet/Malicious Hosts/Custom" | rename dest_count as "Distinct Destinations: Threat Feeds/Botnet/Malicious Hosts/Custom"

`netflow_index` (nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20051" OR nfc_id="20052" OR nfc_id="20053") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | stats count by dest_ip | join type=left dest_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20053" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as threat_feeds sum(bytes) as traffic_threat_feeds, distinct_count(src_ip) as dest_count_threat_feeds by dest_ip] | join type=left dest_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20050" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as bot_num sum(bytes) as traffic_bot, distinct_count(src_ip) as dest_count_bot by dest_ip] | join type=left dest_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20051" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as cust_num sum(bytes) as traffic_cust, distinct_count(src_ip) as dest_count_cust by dest_ip] | join type=left dest_ip [search `netflow_index` nfc_id="20052" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats count as mal_num sum(bytes) as traffic_mal, distinct_count(src_ip) as dest_count_mal by dest_ip] | eval traffic_threat_feeds = if(isnull(traffic_threat_feeds), 0, traffic_threat_feeds) | eval traffic_bot = if(isnull(traffic_bot), 0, traffic_bot) | eval traffic_cust = if(isnull(traffic_cust), 0, traffic_cust) | eval traffic_mal = if(isnull(traffic_mal), 0, traffic_mal) | eval dest_count_threat_feeds = if(isnull(dest_count_threat_feeds), 0, dest_count_threat_feeds) | eval dest_count_bot = if(isnull(dest_count_bot), 0, dest_count_bot) | eval dest_count_cust = if(isnull(dest_count_cust), 0, dest_count_cust) | eval dest_count_mal = if(isnull(dest_count_mal), 0, dest_count_mal) | eval threat_feeds = if(isnull(threat_feeds), 0, threat_feeds) | eval bot_num = if(isnull(bot_num), 0, bot_num) | eval cust_num = if(isnull(cust_num), 0, cust_num) | eval mal_num = if(isnull(mal_num), 0, mal_num) | eval traffic = traffic_threat_feeds + traffic_bot + traffic_mal | eval dest_count = dest_count_threat_feeds . "/" . dest_count_bot . "/" . dest_count_mal . "/" . dest_count_cust | eval event_type = threat_feeds . "/" . bot_num . "/" . mal_num . "/" . cust_num | sort - count | head 100 | eval traffic=traffic/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Traffic MB, traffic)` | table dest_ip event_type "Traffic MB" dest_count | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" | rename event_type as "Flows: Threat Feeds/Botnet/Malicious Hosts/Custom" | rename dest_count as "Distinct Sources: Threat Feeds/Botnet/Malicious Hosts/Custom"

`netflow_index` (nfc_id="20053" OR nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20051" OR nfc_id="20052") src_ip="$Source IP$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eval event_type=case(nfc_id="20053","Threat Feeds",nfc_id="20050","Botnet",nfc_id="20051","Custom Threat Feeds",nfc_id="20052","Malicious Host") | eval details_src=case(nfc_id="20053",origin,nfc_id="20052",reputation,nfc_id="20051",list_name) | eval details=case(details_src="block","IP Address Block",details_src="host","Distinct Host",1=1,details_src) | head 100 | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, flow_count)` | `commas_formatting(Traffic Bytes, bytes)` | `commas_formatting(Min Bytes, min_bytes)` | `commas_formatting(Max Bytes, max_bytes)` | table exp_ip_name event_type src_ip dest_ip "Flow Count" "Traffic Bytes" "Min Bytes" "Max Bytes" direction details | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename event_type as "Event Type" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" | rename direction as "Direction" | rename details as "Details"

`netflow_index` (nfc_id="20053" OR nfc_id="20050" OR nfc_id="20051" OR nfc_id="20052") dest_ip="$Destination IP$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(min_bytes)` | `sampling(max_bytes)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eval event_type=case(nfc_id="20053","Threat Feeds",nfc_id="20050","Botnet",nfc_id="20051","Custom Threat Feeds",nfc_id="20052","Malicious Host") | eval details_src=case(nfc_id="20053",origin,nfc_id="20052",reputation,nfc_id="20051",list_name) | eval details=case(details_src="block","IP Address Block",details_src="host","Distinct Host",1=1,details_src) | head 100 | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, flow_count)` | `commas_formatting(Traffic Bytes, bytes)` | `commas_formatting(Min Bytes, min_bytes)` | `commas_formatting(Max Bytes, max_bytes)` | table exp_ip_name event_type src_ip dest_ip "Flow Count" "Traffic Bytes" "Min Bytes" "Max Bytes" direction details | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename event_type as "Event Type" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" | rename direction as "Direction" | rename details as "Details"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Modules "10050: Botnet Command and Control Traffic Monitor", "10051: Custom Threat list Monitor", "10052: Host Reputation Monitor" and "10053: Threat Feeds Monitor" (syslogs with nfc_id=20050, nfc_id=20052 and nfc_id=20053). These Modules are packaged in NFO “Security” Module Set.
Please make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
